title: Nikenichi! Non Non Zenshou Kichi

synonyms: Nikke Nichi! Non Non Zenshou Kichi
alternative_titles.ja: にけにち！のんのん前哨基地

synopsis:
Commander, there's no need to sortie today.
No emergency missions. No roaring gunfire.
At this moment in the Outpost, all that remains are the Nikkes' everyday moments, laughter, and little unexpected happenings.

(Source: Official GODDESS OF VICTORY: NIKKE's English X Account)
